headline: How The Enerflex (TSX:EFX) Story Is Shifting As Analyst Views Diverge
summary: The latest Enerflex update keeps the core fair value estimate steady at about CA$37.21, while some bullish analysts are now flagging upside with individual price targets such as CA$39, up from CA$28. This gap between a largely unchanged central valuation anchor and higher individual targets reflects the current mix of optimism about upside potential and caution around execution risks. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting targets and use the evolving analyst narrative as a...
